message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Re-review: blocking items fixed, CI green">
Luca has addressed all blocking review items and CI is green. Reviewers who had blocking items — please re-review to verify your concerns are resolved:

- Steve Krug, Lea Verou, Steve Schoger: context headings/grouping
- Carson Gross: filter partial swap
- Heydon Pickering: focus management + visible label on context select
- Marty Cagan: your 2 blocking items

If satisfied, please send your consensus approval to luca-palmieri. Kent Beck and Scott Wlaschin already approved.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good, the team-lead has confirmed that Marty had 2 blocking items but still hasn't specified what they are. Let me ask Marty directly again.

input.content:
Marty, the team-lead has confirmed you had 2 blocking items on the Step 4 (Next Actions with Contexts) implementation. I've addressed all other reviewers' blocking items and CI is green (commit e2c292e).

Could you please share your 2 blocking items so I can verify they're addressed or fix them if needed? I want to make sure we have full consensus before closing this task.
input.summary: Requesting Marty's 2 blocking items for Step 4
